mapper.select: SELECT organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM organization WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId}
SELECT organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM organization WHERE organization_name = #{organizationName}
SELECT organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM organization ORDER BY organization_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO organization ( organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( COALESCE(#{organizationId}, gen_random_uuid()), #{organizationName}, #{description}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDt}, NOW()), #{chgId}, COALESCE(#{chgDt}, NOW()), #{delYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE organization SET organization_name = #{organizationName}, description = #{description}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW(), del_yn = #{delYn} WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO organization( organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( COALESCE(#{organization.organizationId}, gen_random_uuid()), #{organization.organizationName}, #{organization.description}, #{organization.regId}, COALESCE(#{organization.regDt}, NOW()), #{organization.chgId}, COALESCE(#{organization.chgDt}, NOW()), #{organization.delYn} )

update.foreach: UPDATE organization SET organization_name = #{organization.organizationName}, description = #{organization.description}, chg_id = #{organization.chgId}, chg_dt = COALESCE(#{organization.chgDt}, NOW()), del_yn = #{organization.delYn} WHERE organization_id = #{organization.organizationId}

mapper.select:
SELECT organization_id FROM organization WHERE organization_id IN
#{organizationId}

SELECT organization_name FROM organization WHERE organization_name IN
#{organizationName}

SELECT organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM organization
AND (
(organization_name = #{item.organizationName} AND organization_id != #{item.organizationId})
)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO organization ( organization_id, organization_name, description, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{organization.organizationId}, #{organization.organizationName}, #{organization.description}, #{organization.regId}, #{organization.regDt}, #{organization.chgId}, #{organization.chgDt}, #{organization.delYn} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM organization WHERE organization_id IN
#{organization.organizationId}
